home.description: Fun, practical, and personalized Japanese lessons for learners of every level, worldwide. Book your first lesson with Lisa today.

About.title: Hi, I'm Lisa
About.intro: I've spent my career on one question: what actually gets someone speaking Japanese, not just studying it? These lessons are the answer I've landed on.

philosophy.title: Teaching philosophy
philosophy.body: Fluency is built in conversation, not in isolation from it. Every lesson uses grammar and vocabulary in real sentences from the very first session, so you're always practicing the thing you actually came here to do: talk.

ContactForm.messagePlaceholder: What would you like to work on? Any goals, deadlines, or questions before booking?
ContactForm.submitError: Something went wrong sending your message. Please try again in a moment.
ContactForm.successDescription: Thanks for reaching out — Lisa will reply by email to schedule your first lesson.

errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.

Contact.title: Let's start your Japanese
Contact.description: Tell Lisa a little about your goals and she'll follow up to schedule your first lesson.

Pricing.title: Pricing is coming soon
Pricing.description: Lisa is finalizing course pricing. In the meantime, get in touch directly and she'll confirm current rates and availability for your goals.

Faq.title: Frequently asked questions
Faq.description: Still have a question after reading these? Just ask — the contact page goes straight to Lisa.

Lessons.title: Find your course
Lessons.description: Every course is one-on-one and delivered live over Zoom or Google Meet — mix and match as your goals change.

hero.title: Learn Japanese with Lisa
hero.subtitle: Fun, practical, and personalized Japanese lessons
hero.description: Whether you're saying your first "konnichiwa" or prepping for the JLPT, Lisa builds every lesson around you — your goals, your pace, your schedule.

features.title: One teacher, every path into Japanese
features.description: Pick a focus today — mix in another whenever your goals change.

testimonials.title: What students say after a few lessons

finalCta.title: Ready to actually speak Japanese?
